backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing user profiles, chapter management (add, update status, add study time), and daily study goal functionality with access control authorization checks for all operations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that preserves existing userProfiles data while initializing new empty maps for chaptersByUser and dailyStudyGoalsByUser during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting six implemented features including syllabus tracker page, chapter creation form, status toggle, study timer, chapter-timer association, and daily study goals with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, authentication, dashboard components, syllabus tracker, study timer, and styling with warm earth tone color system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH-based color system for light and dark modes including terracotta, sage, and cream tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Tracky application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup with protected routes, authentication checks, profile setup redirect logic, and navigation between login, dashboard, and syllabus tracker pages.
frontend/src/components/ChapterStatsCard: Card component displaying completed chapters (sage green with checkmark) and pending chapters (terracotta with circle) counts plus total chapter count.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header navigation, user profile display, and logout functionality. Includes responsive navigation for Dashboard and Syllabus Tracker pages with route-based active states.
frontend/src/components/ProgressCard.tsx: Displays overall syllabus completion percentage in a card with a progress bar and trending icon.
frontend/src/components/StudyGoalCard.ts: Card component for setting and tracking daily study goals in minutes, showing progress bar and completion status with celebration message when goal is reached.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimeCard.ts: Displays total accumulated study time across all subjects in a formatted card with clock icon.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimer.tsx: Interactive timer component for tracking study sessions with chapter name input, start/stop controls, and automatic saving of elapsed time to backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality with AuthClient management and delegation identity handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, chapters, study time tracking, daily goals, and dashboard statistics with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm earth tone color palette (terracotta, sage, cream) for light and dark modes, plus base typography styles and utility classes for shadows and transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying three cards (progress percentage, study time, chapter stats) with loading states, error handling, and a welcome message for new users.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a centered card layout with branding, error handling, and loading states during sign-in.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Profile setup page that collects and validates user email address, saves it via mutation, then navigates to dashboard upon successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/SyllabusTrackerPage.t: Syllabus tracker page with form to add chapters, displays chapter statistics (total/completed/pending), and includes StudyTimer and StudyGoalCard components with loading and error states.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormatters.ts: Utility functions to format study time in minutes to readable strings in both short format (2h 30m) and long format (2 hours 30 minutes).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter utilities for extracting values from query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and functions to store, retrieve, and clear parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom color schemes using OKLCH color space (including terracotta, sage, cream), extended theme settings for borders, shadows, animations, and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting 'Tracky', a student productivity app with features for user authentication, syllabus tracking, study time tracking per chapter, and a dashboard displaying progress metrics; includes architectural notes emphasizing per-user data isolation and permanent chapter persistence.
